pokemon:beartic.name: Beartic
pokemon:beartic.summary: It freezes its breath to create fangs and claws of ice to fight with. Cold northern areas are its habitat.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It freezes its breath to create fangs and claws of ice to fight with. Cold northern areas are its habitat.
It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.
They love the cold seas of the north. They create pathways across the ocean waters by freezing their own breath.
They love the cold seas of the north. They create pathways across the ocean waters by freezing their own breath.
It swims energetically through frigid seas. When it gets tired, it freezes the seawater with its breath so it can rest on the ice.
It swims through frigid seas, searching for prey. From its frozen breath, it forms icy fangs that are harder than steel.
It freezes its breath to create fangs and claws of ice to fight with. Cold northern areas are its habitat.
They love the cold seas of the north. They create pathways across the ocean waters by freezing their own breath.
They love the cold seas of the north. They create pathways across the ocean waters by freezing their own breath.
It freezes its breath to create fangs and claws of ice to fight with. Cold northern areas are its habitat.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It freezes its breath to create fangs and claws of ice to fight with. Cold northern areas are its habitat.

pokemon:cubchoo.name: Cubchoo
pokemon:cubchoo.summary: Their snot is a barometer of health. When healthy, their snot is sticky and the power of their ice moves increases.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Their snot is a barometer of health. When healthy, their snot is sticky and the power of their ice moves increases.
When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases.
Their snot is a barometer of health. When healthy, their snot is sticky and the power of their ice moves increases.
Its nose is always running. It sniffs the snot back up because the mucus provides the raw material for its moves.
It sniffles before performing a move, using its frosty snot to provide an icy element to any move that needs it.
When this Pokémon is in good health, its snot becomes thicker and stickier. It will smear its snot on anyone it doesn’t like.
Its nose is always running. It sniffs the snot back up because the mucus provides the raw material for its moves.
Their snot is a barometer of health. When healthy, their snot is sticky and the power of their ice moves increases.
Its nose is always running. It sniffs the snot back up because the mucus provides the raw material for its moves.
Their snot is a barometer of health. When healthy, their snot is sticky and the power of their ice moves increases.
